# zstack_vpc_ha_group (Resource)

This resource allows you to manage VPC HA Groups in ZStack. A VPC HA Group provides high availability for VPC virtual routers.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the VPC HA Group.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description for the VPC HA Group.
- `monitor_ips` (List of String) List of IP addresses to monitor for HA.

### Read-Only

- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the VPC HA Group.
